hero.subtitle: Association of Korean Canadian Science & Engineering
hero.desc: We bridge the gap between academic life and the professional world for Korean-Canadian students in STEM across the National Capital Region.

upcoming_events.title: Fall General Meeting & Registration
upcoming_events.description: Kickoff for the new semester. Learn about upcoming technical workshops, networking events, and the national scholarship application process.

about_page.title: Mission & Identity.
about_page.subtitle: Established locally, connected nationally.
about_page.national_desc: The Association of Korean Canadian Science and Engineering (AKCSE) is a non-profit organization dedicated to fostering a network of Korean-Canadian professionals and students in STEM fields. It serves as a bridge for career development, academic excellence, and international collaboration.
about_page.chapter_desc: Situated in Canada's capital, our chapter specifically empowers students at the University of Ottawa. We provide a platform for networking, mentorship, and technical growth, helping our members transition seamlessly from their undergraduate studies into the vibrant tech and government sectors of Ottawa.
about_page.board_subtitle: The team behind the 2026/2027 academic year.
